runner_notes: Seed deviation: ordered seed 424242 generates the harvest/yield domain and `yield` is a Python keyword -> the seed project is a SyntaxError (make_seed.py bug, pinned tree, needs a do-not-automerge fix). Used the first keyword-safe seed above it: 424243 -> cedarvisit (visit/visits/duration, verb `log`). 424245 was also skipped-by-rule: it reproduces run-1's exact galereading surface.

Engagement deviation: kit v1.3.0's P0 engagement gate (post-run-1) holds a bare adopt born-red under check --strict, so run_ab.py prepare's smoke step fails by design. Per the harness's own instruction ('fix the arm before running any session'), the runner completed the documented RED->ENGAGED->GREEN arc on the ON arm: answered all 13 interview slots (truthful seed-project values), render --live, re-planted .claude/CLAUDE.md (render --live cannot fill it - second kit gap), first session card (adoption session, status complete), control/status.md heartbeat; committed as 4dc12b6. check --strict AND check --strict --require-session-log both exit 0.
manifest.json written by the runner because prepare aborts before writing it when smoke fails; fields mirror cmd_prepare's schema.
